title: Sales Pro to enterprise migration
excerpt: Hello, I have one of my client looking for migration from monday sales pro to monday enterprise edition. They have been using monday CRM for  a while and have lots of boards and automations, including data. My question i…

posts.author: Vivekcloudcache (Vivek Singh)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I have one of my client looking for migration from monday sales pro to monday enterprise edition. They have been using monday CRM for a while and have lots of boards and automations, including data. My question is if they migrate to PRO, do we need to do any migration of data , boards and automations?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Vivek,

To confirm, are you looking to upgrade Sales CRM Pro to Sales CRM Enterprise? If that’s the case, this shouldn’t require any sort of data migration as you’re not changing infrastructures or monday.com accounts - for specific advice, I would recommend reaching out to our support team as they’ll be able to walk you through the process
